mapper.insert: INSERT INTO subscriptions (user_id, name, start_date, billing_cycle, amount) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{startDate}, #{billingCycle}, #{amount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, start_date, billing_cycle, amount, EXTRACT(DAY FROM start_date)::INT AS next_billing_day, created_at FROM subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE subscriptions SET name = #{name}, start_date = #{startDate}, billing_cycle = #{billingCycle}, amount = #{amount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
